enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
'Promoter' means, the person who together with his relatives [as defined in Section
2 (77) of the Companies Act, 2013 and Rules made there under], by virtue of his
ownership of voting equity shares, will be/ is in effective control of the bank /
NOFHC, and includes, wherever applicable, all entities which form part of the
Promoter Group.
enriched_requirements.object: together with his relatives [as defined in Section 2 (77) of the Companies Act, 2013 and Rules made there under], by virtue of his ownership of voting equity shares, will be/ is in effective control of the bank / NOFHC, and includes

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Explanation: The term 'effective control' means any arrangement whether in the
form of shareholding or agreement or otherwise, which enables exercise of control.
enriched_requirements.object: the form of shareholding or agreement or otherwise, which enables exercise of control

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: 'Promoting entity' means the entity that promotes the bank.
enriched_requirements.object: the bank

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Provided that a financial institution, scheduled commercial bank, foreign
institutional investor or mutual fund shall not be deemed to be promoter group
merely by virtue of the fact that ten per cent or more of the equity share capital of
the promoter is held by such institution unless such investment is strategic in
nature.
enriched_requirements.object: promoter group merely by virtue of the fact that ten per cent or more of the equity share capital of the promoter is held by such inst

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The small finance bank shall be registered as a public limited company under the
Companies Act, 2013.
enriched_requirements.object: public limited company under the Companies Act, 2013

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(4) Primary (Urban) Co-operative Bank (UCBs), which is desirous of voluntarily
transitioning into small finance bank, may refer to Scheme on voluntary
transition of Urban Co-operative Bank into a Small Finance Bank, as detailed
in Chapter II of this Guidelines.
enriched_requirements.object: voluntary transition of Urban Co-operative Bank into a Small Finance Bank, as detailed in Chapter II of this Guidelines

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(6) As local focus and the ability to serve smaller customers will be the key criteria
in licensing such banks, this may be a more appropriate vehicle for local players
or players who are focused on lending to unserved / underserved sections of
the society.
enriched_requirements.object: vehicle for local players or players who are focused on lending to unserved / underserved sections of the society

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
'Fit and Proper' criteria
(1) Promoters / Promoter Groups should be 'fit and proper' in order to be eligible
to promote small finance banks.
enriched_requirements.object: in order to be eligible to promote small finance banks

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Corporate Structure
(1) The promoters / promoter group may choose to set up the small finance bank
either as a standalone entity or under a holding company, which shall act as
the promoting entity of the bank.
enriched_requirements.object: entity of the bank

conditions:
if there is an intermediate company between the small finance bank
and its promoting entity
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) However, if there is an intermediate company between the small finance bank
and its promoting entity, it should be a Non-Operative Financial Holding
Company (NOFHC).
enriched_requirements.object: Holding Company (NOFHC)

conditions:
If the promoters desire to set up the small finance bank
under a holding company structure
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
If the promoters desire to set up the small finance bank
under a holding company structure, without an NOFHC, the holding company /
the promoting entity shall be registered as an NBFC-CIC with the Reserve
Bank.
enriched_requirements.object: NBFC-CIC with the Reserve Bank

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(3) The general principle for reorganisation of the activities in the group is that all
activities permitted to a bank under Section 6 (1) (a) to (o) of Banking
Regulation Act, 1949 shall be carried out from the bank.
enriched_requirements.object: the bank

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
However, if the
Promoters desire to continue existing specialized activities from a separate
entity proposed to be held under the NOFHC, prior approval from RBI would be
required and it should be ensured that similar activities are not conducted
through the bank.
enriched_requirements.object: activities are not conducted through the bank

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A small finance bank, in furtherance of the objectives for which it is set up, shall
primarily undertake basic banking activities of acceptance of deposits and lending
to unserved and underserved sections including small business units, small and
marginal farmers, micro and small industries and unorganised sector entities.
enriched_requirements.object: activities of acceptance of deposits and lending to unserved and underserved sections including small business units

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Further, a scheduled SFB, after completion of at least two years of operations as
Authorised Dealer Category-II, will be eligible for Authorised Dealer Category-I
license, subject to compliance with the following eligibility norms:
(1) The bank should have completed at least two years of operations as Authorised
Dealer Category-II.
enriched_requirements.object: two years of operations as Authorised Dealer Category-II

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: (2) The bank should have been included in the Second Schedule to RBI Act 1934.
enriched_requirements.object: the Second Schedule to RBI Act 1934

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: (3) It should have a minimum net worth of ₹500 crore.
enriched_requirements.object: worth of ₹500 crore

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: (4) Its CRAR should not be less than 15%.
(5) The net NPAs of the bank should not exceed 6%, during previous four quarters.
enriched_requirements.object: four quarters

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: (6) It should have made profit in the preceding two years.
enriched_requirements.object: the preceding two years

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(7) It should not have defaulted in maintenance of CRR/ SLR during previous two
years.
enriched_requirements.object: of CRR/ SLR during previous two years

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: (8) It should have sound internal control systems.
enriched_requirements.object: systems

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: (9) It should not have any major regulatory and supervisory concerns.
enriched_requirements.object: and supervisory concerns

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The eligible SFB may approach Foreign Exchange Department, Central Office,
Reserve Bank of India through PRAVAAH with its applications along with the
<image>
supporting documents with regard to their eligibility and requisite documents for
grant of Authorised Dealer Category-I license.
enriched_requirements.object: Central Office, Reserve Bank of India through PRAVAAH with its applications along with the <image> supporting do

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Small finance bank will have general permission to open banking outlets from the
date of commencement of business as per Reserve Bank of India (Small Finance
Banks - Branch Authorisation) Directions, 2025 as amended from time to time
subject to the condition that it is required to open at least 25 per cent of its banking
outlets in unbanked rural centres (population upto 9,999 as per the latest census)
within one year from the date of commencement of operations..
enriched_requirements.object: 25 per cent of its banking outlets in unbanked rural centres (population upto 9,999 as per the latest census) within one year from th

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
It is expected that the small
finance bank should primarily be responsive to local needs.
enriched_requirements.object: local needs

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
After the initial
stabilization period of five years, and after a review, RBI may liberalize the scope
of activities of the small finance banks.
enriched_requirements.object: activities of the small finance banks

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The other financial and non-financial services activities of the promoters, if
any, should be kept distinctly ring-fenced and not comingled with the banking
business.
enriched_requirements.object: and not comingled with the banking business

conditions:
provided that there
is an agreement / contract
enriched_requirements.object: / contract, etc

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The minimum paid-up voting equity share capital/ net worth for small finance banks
shall be ₹300 crore, except for such small finance bank which has:
(1) Transitioned from a UCB: The minimum net worth shall be ₹150 crore from
the date of commencement of business.

(2) Converted from NBFC/MFI/LAB/PB: The entity shall have a minimum net
worth of ₹300 crore or it shall infuse additional paid-up voting equity share
capital to achieve net worth of ₹300 crore within eighteen months from the date
of in-principle approval or as on the date of commencement of operations,
whichever is earlier.
enriched_requirements.object: worth of ₹300 crore or it shall infuse additional paid-up voting equity share capital to achieve net worth of ₹300 crore within eig

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Explanation: The minimum paid-up voting equity share capital/ net worth of
₹300 crore should be readily available at the time of obtaining banking licence.
enriched_requirements.object: the time of obtaining banking licence

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The small finance bank shall be required to maintain a minimum capital adequacy
ratio of 15 per cent of its risk weighted assets (RWA) on a continuous basis, subject
to any higher percentage as may be prescribed by RBI from time to time.
enriched_requirements.object: a minimum capital adequacy ratio of 15 per cent of its risk weighted assets (RWA) on a continuous basis

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Tier I
capital should be at least 7.5 per cent of RWAs.

Tier II capital should be limited to
a maximum of 100 per cent of total Tier I capital.
enriched_requirements.object: maximum of 100 per cent of total Tier I capital

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The bank shall be guided by
Reserve Bank of India (Small Finance Banks-Prudential Norms on Capital
Adequacy) Directions, 2025 with respect to capital adequacy requirements.
enriched_requirements.object: Bank of India (Small Finance Banks-Prudential Norms on Capital Adequacy) Directions, 2025 with respect to capital adequacy requir

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The promoters shall hold a minimum of 40 per cent of the paid-up voting equity
share capital of the bank at all times during the first five years from the date of
commencement of business of the bank.
enriched_requirements.object: 40 per cent of the paid-up voting equity share capital of the bank at all times during the first five years from the date of commenc

enriched_requirements.timeline:
within 15 years from the date of commencement of business of the
bank
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Further, the
promoters' stake should be brought down to 26 per cent of paid-up voting equity
<image>
share capital within 15 years from the date of commencement of business of the
bank.
enriched_requirements.object: 26 per cent of paid-up voting equity <image> share capital within 15 years from the date of commencement of business of the bank

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Further, in the case of such small finance bank which has transitioned from UCB,
the promoters shall hold a minimum of 26 per cent of paid-up voting equity share
capital at all times during the first five years from commencement of business of
the bank.
enriched_requirements.object: 26 per cent of paid-up voting equity share capital at all times during the first five years from commencement of business of the ban

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The Promoters' holding in excess of 26 per cent may be brought down
to 26 per cent over a period of 15 years from the date of reaching net worth of ₹300
crore by such UCBs.
enriched_requirements.object: 26 per cent over a period of 15 years from the date of reaching net worth of ₹300 crore by such UCBs

conditions:
If the existing NBFCs/MFIs/LABs have diluted the promoters' shareholding to
below 40 per cent
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
If the existing NBFCs/MFIs/LABs have diluted the promoters' shareholding to
below 40 per cent, but above 26 per cent, due to regulatory requirements or
otherwise, RBI may not insist on the promoters' minimum initial contribution.
enriched_requirements.object: minimum initial contribution

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
At the time of issue of licences, the promoters having shareholding in excess of 40
per cent or 26 per cent of paid-up voting equity share capital, as applicable, shall
submit a dilution schedule for bringing down the stake to 26 per cent within 15
years, which will be examined and approved by the RBI.
enriched_requirements.object: for bringing down the stake to 26 per cent within 15 years, which will be examined and approved by the RBI

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The progress in achieving
these agreed milestones must be periodically reported by the banks and will be
monitored by RBI.
enriched_requirements.object: the banks and will be monitored by RBI

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Any proposed material change (i.e., any change of 10
per cent or above of shareholding) in the shareholding pattern in the promoter
entity at the time of application and during the period between the application and
grant of license should be reported to RBI.

The newly set up small finance bank should ensure that it puts in place a robust
risk management framework.
enriched_requirements.object: in place a robust risk management framework

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
While 40
per cent of its ANBC or CEOBE, whichever is higher, should be allocated to
different sub-sectors under PSL as per the extant PSL prescriptions, the bank can
allocate the balance 20 per cent to any one or more sub-sectors under the PSL
where it has competitive advantage.
enriched_requirements.object: sub-sectors under PSL as per the extant PSL prescriptions, the bank can allocate the balance 20 per cent to any one or more

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In order to ensure that the bank extends loans primarily to small borrowers, at least
50 per cent of its loan portfolio should constitute loans and advances of up to ₹ 25
lakh on an ongoing basis.
enriched_requirements.object: of up to ₹ 25 lakh on an ongoing basis

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Further, the criteria of upper limit of ₹ 25 lakh shall
be borrower wise.

It may be noted that on
conversion into a small finance bank, the NBFC / MFI / PB will cease to exist and
all its business which a bank can undertake should fold into the bank and the
activities which a bank cannot statutorily undertake be divested / disposed of.
enriched_requirements.object: conversion into a small finance bank, the NBFC / MFI / PB will cease to exist and all its business which a bank can undertake should

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Further, the conversion of branches of the NBFC / MFI / PB into bank branches
shall be as per the stipulations in the Reserve Bank of India (Small Finance Banks
- Branch Authorisation) Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: stipulations in the Reserve Bank of India (Small Finance Banks - Branch Authorisation) Directions, 2025

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: The business plan submitted by the applicant should be realistic and viable.

In
case of deviation from the stated business plan after issue of license, RBI may
consider restricting the bank's expansion, effecting change in management and
imposing other penal / regulatory measures as may be necessary.
enriched_requirements.object: expansion, effecting change in management and imposing other penal / regulatory measures as may be necessary

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The Board of small finance bank should have a majority of independent Directors,
as defined in Companies Act, 2013.
enriched_requirements.object: independent Directors, as defined in Companies Act, 2013

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The small finance bank should comply with the corporate governance guidelines
including 'fit and proper' criteria for Directors as issued by RBI from time to time.
enriched_requirements.object: governance guidelines including 'fit and proper' criteria for Directors as issued by RBI from time to time

conditions: If a promoter of a payments bank desires to set up a small finance bank
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
If a promoter of a payments bank desires to set up a small finance bank, both the
banks should be under NOFHC structure.

The limits on
shareholding, as prescribed in Annex-I of the Reserve Bank of India (Small
Finance Banks - Acquisition and Holding of Shares or Voting Rights) Directions,
2025 shall be applicable.

conditions: In case of existing NBFCs/MFIs/LABs converting into small finance bank
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In case of existing NBFCs/MFIs/LABs converting into small finance bank, where
there is shareholding in excess of 10 per cent and 15 per cent of the paid-up voting
equity capital by entities, other than the promoters (including private equity funds),
RBI may consider providing time up to three years from the date of the 'in principle'
approval for the shareholding to be brought down to a maximum of 10%/15%.
enriched_requirements.object: to three years from the date of the 'in principle' approval for the shareholding to be brought down to a maximum of 10%/15%

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The operations of the bank should be technology driven from the beginning,
conforming to generally accepted standards and norms;
enriched_requirements.object: the beginning, conforming to generally accepted standards and norms

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
while new approaches
(such as for data storage, security and real time data updation) are encouraged, a
detailed technology plan for the same should be furnished to RBI.

The bank should have a high powered Customer Grievances Cell to handle
customer complaints.
enriched_requirements.object: Customer Grievances Cell to handle customer complaints

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In terms of Rule 11 of the Banking Regulation (Companies) Rules, 1949,
applications shall be submitted in the prescribed form (Form III).
enriched_requirements.object: prescribed form (Form III)

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In addition, the
applicants should furnish the business plan as per paragraph 34 and other requisite
information as per the Annex I.
enriched_requirements.object: as per paragraph 34 and other requisite information as per the Annex I

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The applicant should also furnish a plan and
methodologies they would adopt to comply with all the requirements of the
guidelines.
enriched_requirements.object: and methodologies they would adopt to comply with all the requirements of the guidelines

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Applications for setting up of
small finance banks in the private sector, along with other details as mentioned
above, should be submitted through PRAVAAH and should be addressed to:
The Chief General Manager,
Department of Regulation,
Reserve Bank of India,
Central Office,
Central Office Building,
Shahid Bhagat Singh Road,
Mumbai - 400001
<image>
enriched_requirements.object: and should be addressed to: The Chief General Manager, Department of Regulation, Reserve Bank of India, Central Office, C

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
RBI may apply
additional criteria to determine the suitability of applications, in addition to the 'fit
and proper' criteria prescribed at paragraph 8 and 9 above.
enriched_requirements.object: determine the suitability of applications, in addition to the 'fit and proper' criteria prescribed at paragraph 8 and 9 a

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The Committee will reserve the right
to call for more information as well as have discussions with any applicant/s and
seek clarification on any issue as may be required by it.

After issue of the 'in-principle approval' for setting up of a small finance bank, if any
adverse features are noticed regarding the Promoters or the companies / entities
with which the Promoters are associated and the group in which they have interest,
the RBI may impose additional conditions and if warranted, may withdraw the 'in-
principle approval'.
enriched_requirements.object: if warranted, may withdraw the 'in- principle approval'

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In terms of Section 5 (ccv) read with Section 56 of the Banking Regulation Act,
1949 a primary co-operative bank (Urban Co-operative Bank or UCB) means a co-
operative society, other than a primary agricultural credit society, whose:
(1) Primary object or principal business of which is the transaction of banking
business;
enriched_requirements.object: other than a primary agricultural credit society, whose: (1) Primary object or principal business of which is the transaction

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
and
(3) Bye-laws of which do not permit admission of any other co-operative society
as a member: Provided that this sub-clause shall not apply to the admission of
a co-operative bank as a member by reason of such co-operative bank
subscribing to the share capital of such co-operative society out of funds
provided by the State Government for the purpose.
enriched_requirements.object: of a co-operative bank as a member by reason of such co-operative bank subscribing to the share capital of such co-operative so

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Under the scheme UCBs with a good track record shall be eligible to voluntarily
transition into a SFB.
enriched_requirements.object: transition into a SFB

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Eligible UCB shall identify promoters in the manner as set
out subsequently in the scheme for making an application to RBI for transition to
SFB under the scheme.
enriched_requirements.object: manner as set out subsequently in the scheme for making an application to RBI for transition to SFB under the scheme

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The promoters shall incorporate a public limited company under
the Companies Act, 2013 having the word 'bank' in its name after receiving the in-
principle approval from RBI.
enriched_requirements.object: company under the Companies Act, 2013 having the word 'bank' in its name after receiving the in- principle approval from

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The board of directors of the company shall have
required experience and shall meet RBI's 'fit and proper' criteria.
enriched_requirements.object: shall meet RBI's 'fit and proper' criteria

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The above company shall enter into an agreement with UCB for transfer of assets
and liabilities, to be executed at a future date (after issuance of SFB licence).
enriched_requirements.object: with UCB for transfer of assets and liabilities, to be executed at a future date (after issuance of SFB licence)

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The
promoters shall then approach RBI for issuance of SFB licence, with evidence of
funds available for infusion as equity in any acceptable form, so as to ensure that
the SFB commences operations with a minimum net worth of ₹150 crore and
minimum promoters' contribution of 26% of the paid-up share capital as well as
voting rights of the bank (subject to paragraph 19 (1) above).
enriched_requirements.object: issuance of SFB licence, with evidence of funds available for infusion as equity in any acceptable form, so as to ensure that th

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Promoters
(1)A group of individuals/professionals, having an association with UCB as regular
members for a period of not less than three years and approved by General Body
with 2/3rd majority of members present and voting shall be treated as promoters
for the incorporation of the new public limited company.
enriched_requirements.object: for the incorporation of the new public limited company

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2)The promoters must be residents and shall have ten years of experience in banking
and finance.
enriched_requirements.object: experience in banking and finance

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Promoter / Promoter Groups shall conform to the definition of the SEBI
(Issue of Capital & Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2009 and RBI
guidelines on 'fit and proper'.
enriched_requirements.object: of the SEBI (Issue of Capital & Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2009 and RBI guidelines on 'fit and proper'

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Capital requirement: The minimum net worth of the proposed SFB shall be ₹150
crore from the date of commencement of business.
enriched_requirements.object: the date of commencement of business

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
As small finance banks are
required to maintain a minimum capital adequacy ratio of 15 per cent of its risk
weighted assets (RWA) on a continuous basis, availability of adequate capital shall
be ensured.

Promoters shall maintain at least 26% of the paid-up voting equity
share capital.
enriched_requirements.object: of the paid-up voting equity share capital

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The scheme shall be 'on-tap', and the applications could be submitted to the
Reserve Bank at any point of time, through PRAVAAH.
enriched_requirements.object: applications could be submitted to the Reserve Bank at any point of time, through PRAVAAH

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In terms of Rule 11 of the
Banking Regulation (Companies) Rules, 1949, promoters shall submit application
in the prescribed form (Form III) along with the following documents and
information:
(1) The general body resolution by 2/3rd majority of members present and voting to
transition into a Small Finance Bank as per the scheme and authorizing the Board
of Directors for taking all steps for facilitating smooth transition process.
enriched_requirements.object: prescribed form (Form III) along with the following documents and information: (1) The general body resolution by 2/3rd majo

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Along with the application, the promoters shall submit documents for establishing
compliance with the requirements and ensure that the UCB continues to comply
with the above parameters till the application is finally disposed of.
enriched_requirements.object: compliance with the requirements and ensure that the UCB continues to comply with the above parameters till the appl

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The promoters shall furnish their business plans and project reports along with their
applications.
enriched_requirements.object: and project reports along with their applications

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The business plan
submitted by the applicant should be realistic and viable.

conditions:
In case of deviation from
the stated business plan after issue of licence
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In case of deviation from
the stated business plan after issue of licence, RBI may consider restricting the
SFB's expansion, effecting change in management and imposing other penal
measures as may be necessary.
enriched_requirements.object: expansion, effecting change in management and imposing other penal measures as may be necessary

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The promoters must ensure to furnish following additional information along with
the application:
(1) Information of individual promoters
enriched_requirements.object: additional information along with the application: (1) Information of individual promoters

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(ii) The applicants should furnish detailed information about the persons who would
subscribe to 5% or more of the paid-up equity share capital (shareholding pattern)
of the proposed bank and the sources of capital of the proposed investors.
enriched_requirements.object: the persons who would subscribe to 5% or more of the paid-up equity share capital (shareholding pattern) of the pro

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(ii) It should include detailed calculation of capital requirement after transfer of assets
and liabilities of the UCB in order to maintain minimum CRAR of 15% from the date
of commencement of business.
enriched_requirements.object: capital requirement after transfer of assets and liabilities of the UCB in order to maintain minimum CRAR of 15% from

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(iii) The project report should give as much concrete details as feasible, based on
adequate ground level information and avoid unrealistic or unduly ambitious
projections.
enriched_requirements.object: details as feasible, based on adequate ground level information and avoid unrealistic or unduly ambitious projections

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(iv) The business plan should address how the bank proposes to achieve financial
inclusion and how the existing business of the UCB will fold into the small finance
bank or divested / disposed of.
enriched_requirements.object: proposes to achieve financial inclusion and how the existing business of the UCB will fold into the small finance bank or diveste

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(i) The promoters may furnish any other relevant information and documents
supporting the applications.
enriched_requirements.object: information and documents supporting the applications

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Further, the RBI may call for any other additional
information, as may be required, in due course.
enriched_requirements.object: additional information, as may be required, in due course

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(ii) In terms of Rule 11 of the Banking Regulation (Companies) Rules, 1949, promoters
shall submit application in the prescribed form (Form III) along with other details as
mentioned above, through PRAVAAH and should be addressed to:
The Chief General Manager,
Department of Regulation,
Reserve Bank of India,
Central Office,
Central Office Building,
Shahid Bhagat Singh Road,
Mumbai - 400001
enriched_requirements.object: prescribed form (Form III) along with other details as mentioned above, through PRAVAAH and should be addressed to: The Chie

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
After incorporating the banking company and complying with all the terms &
conditions of the in-principle approval, the promoters shall approach RBI for
banking licence along with following:
(1) UCB's board resolution for transfer of assets and liabilities to the banking
company.
enriched_requirements.object: licence along with following: (1) UCB's board resolution for transfer of assets and liabilities to the banking company

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
RBI may apply additional criteria to determine the suitability of applications, in
addition to the prescribed criteria.
enriched_requirements.object: determine the suitability of applications, in addition to the prescribed criteria

conditions:
if any adverse features are
noticed subsequently regarding the promoters or the UCB
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) After issue of the in-principle approval to the UCB, if any adverse features are
noticed subsequently regarding the promoters or the UCB, RBI may impose
additional conditions and if warranted, may withdraw the in-principle approval.
enriched_requirements.object: if warranted, may withdraw the in-principle approval

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The applicants should furnish detailed information about the persons/entities, who
would subscribe to 5% per cent or more of the paid-up voting equity share capital
(shareholding pattern) of the proposed bank/ NOFHC, including foreign equity
participation in the proposed bank/ NOFHC as per the Form A of the Guidelines
provided in the Reserve Bank of India (Small Finance Banks - Acquisition and
<image>
Holding of Shares or Voting Rights) Directions, 2025 and as amended from time to
time.
enriched_requirements.object: the persons/entities, who would subscribe to 5% per cent or more of the paid-up voting equity share capital (shareh

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Also, the sources of capital of the above major shareholders along with details
regarding their significant beneficial ownership, if any, shall be furnished as per the
aforesaid directions.
enriched_requirements.object: the aforesaid directions

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The project report should give as
much concrete details as feasible, based on adequate ground level information
and avoid unrealistic or unduly ambitious projections.
enriched_requirements.object: details as feasible, based on adequate ground level information and avoid unrealistic or unduly ambitious projections

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The business plan should
address how the bank proposes to achieve financial inclusion and in the case of
an NBFC / MFI applicant, how the existing business of NBFC / MFI will fold into the
bank or divested / disposed of.
enriched_requirements.object: proposes to achieve financial inclusion and in the case of an NBFC / MFI applicant, how the existing business of NBFC / MFI will

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Explanation (1): Business plan should, inter alia, include (but not limited to), the
underlying assumptions, the existing infrastructure/ network/ branches, and the
proposed product lines, target clientele, target locations, usage of technology, risk
management, plans relating to human resources, branch network, alternative
points of presence, opening of branches in unbanked rural areas, priority sector
compliance, financial projections for five years, etc.
enriched_requirements.object: (but not limited to), the underlying assumptions, the existing infrastructure/ network/ branches, and the proposed product lines

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Explanation (2): In case of NBFC applicants, information on existing CRR / SLR
requirement, projected CRR / SLR requirement and plan for compliance with
statutory norms on CRR / SLR may be given.

Explanation (3): Financial Inclusion Plan should include (but not limited to), details
of joint venture or partnership for offering financial inclusion products, promoting
financial literacy, achieving the objective of small finance banks, etc.
enriched_requirements.object: to), details of joint venture or partnership for offering financial inclusion products, promoting financial literacy, achievi

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The promoters may furnish any other relevant information and documents
supporting the applications.
enriched_requirements.object: information and documents supporting the applications

conditions: in case the reversal / setting aside is on technical reasons like limitation or lack of jurisdiction
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(Though it shall not be necessary for a person to mention in the column about orders and findings made by
<image>
regulators which have been later on reversed / set aside in toto, it would be necessary to make a mention of the same, in case the reversal / setting aside is on technical reasons like limitation or lack of jurisdiction, etc., and not on merit.
enriched_requirements.object: person to mention in the column about orders and findings made by <image> regulators which have been later on reversed / set aside

conditions: If the order of the regulator is temporarily stayed and the appellate / court proceedings are pending
enriched_requirements.full_sentence: If the order of the regulator is temporarily stayed and the appellate / court proceedings are pending, the same also should be mentioned).

conditions: if already submitted with the application
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Income Tax returns of the individual promoter for last three years (if already submitted with the application, the same may be mentioned)
29.

conditions: if already submitted with the application
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Audited annual reports of the entities listed in 29 above should be submitted for the last five years (if already submitted with the application, the same may be mentioned)

enriched_requirements.object: person to mention in the column about orders and findings made by regulators which have been later on reversed / set aside in toto,
